profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Utama Radar Cahaya Tbk provides goods transportation services in Indonesia. It operates a fleet of trucks, such as dump truck, tronton tank, tank trailer, and trailer unloading box; and other vehicles. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Utama Radar Cahaya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Gelora Rimba Jaya.
